message: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

agent1: done. Tests added in test_image_quantize.py after test_quantize_dither_diff, before test_transparent_colors_equal. If you're adding error_threshold, suggest inserting it before sort_palette in the signature (dither, error_threshold, sort_palette) to minimize conflict surface. My patch is finalized in patch.txt now.

agent2: done with my error_threshold implementation. quantize() signature now: (self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=0) — I added error_threshold as the LAST param. Please add your sort_palette param after mine (at the end) to minimize signature conflicts. I also added a new helper method Image._quantize_mse() and a new test test_quantize_error_threshold() in Tests/test_image_quantize.py (inserted right before test_transparent_colors_equal). I've snapshotted my final files so I can produce a clean patch.txt regardless of your concurrent edits — go ahead and edit the same files, just let me know when you're done so I don't get confused by mid-edit states.
